summary: Iteration 36: Establishment Help Topics (FAQ Estabelecimento) - All features working correctly. Backend APIs fully tested (13/13 passed). Frontend establishment help page working with accordion functionality. Fixed missing route in establishment _layout.tsx.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Added missing 'help' screen to /app/frontend/app/establishment/_layout.tsx Stack navigator - this was causing 'Unmatched Route' error when clicking 'Como Usar' button

test_credentials.admin: email=admin@itoke.master, name=Admin iToke (requires long press on logo + key 'admin123')

seed_data_creation: 8 default establishment help topics created by seed data (tokens, credits, PIX, offers, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Establishment help page at /establishment/help is fully functional. Admin FAQ management has sub-tabs for 'FAQ Cliente' and 'FAQ Estabelecimento'. Admin access requires long press (3s) on iToke logo then entering 'admin123' - this is difficult to test via Playwright due to React Native's Pressable onLongPress not translating well to web. Backend APIs for admin est-help-topics are fully tested and working.

backend: GET /api/est-help-topics - returns list of establishment help topics (public)
GET /api/admin/est-help-topics - requires admin auth (401 without auth, 403 for non-admin)
POST /api/admin/est-help-topics - creates new topic with validation
PUT /api/admin/est-help-topics/{id} - updates topic, returns 404 for non-existent
DELETE /api/admin/est-help-topics/{id} - deletes topic, returns 404 for non-existent
Seed data creates 8 default establishment help topics
frontend: 'Como Usar' button on establishment dashboard navigates to /establishment/help
Help page renders with dark theme and proper styling
Title 'Como Usar o iToke' and subtitle 'Guia para Estabelecimentos' visible
8 help topics displayed with icons (O que sao Tokens?, Como comprar Tokens?, etc.)
Admin FAQ tab has sub-tabs 'FAQ Cliente' and 'FAQ Estabelecimento' (code verified)
